_notes: TEMPLATE -- not the machine value. The image->stage orientation is a rig property MEASURED by orientation/notebooks/set_orientation.ipynb (acquire home/+X/+Y, register, fit the 2x2 Jacobian, snap to the nearest D4). The notebook writes the measured value to orientation/current.json, which the driver reads at save time. Until measured, this identity template means 'no reorientation'. rotate_deg is a clockwise 90-degree increment in {0,90,180,270}; mirror is a horizontal flip. A separate concern from pixel-scale calibration and from limits.
